# PERF-066 positive: more than 5 middlewares passed to a single .Use(...) call
lang: go
file: PERF-066-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func BuildDeepChain() *gin.Engine {
	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(
		gin.Recovery(),
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
		func(c *gin.Context) { c.Next() },
	)
	return r
}
